scenes.visual_description: Close-up of a soggy, stained paper coffee cup sitting on a high-end glass desk next to a luxury watch. The lighting is dim and uninspired. A hand reaches for it but hesitates.
scenes.narration: Still settling for the standard paper cup? Your performance deserves a premium aesthetic.
scenes.camera_direction: Slow macro zoom on the coffee stain, followed by a quick whip-pan to the right.
scenes.image_prompt: Cinematic close-up, 9:16, a soggy paper coffee cup with brown stains on a glass desk, blurred luxury watch in background, moody office lighting, silver and espresso color palette.

scenes.visual_description: A sleek, silver and espresso Volt Brew can slides into the frame, replacing the paper cup. Condensation glistens on the cold metal. A hand in a tailored suit sleeve picks it up.
scenes.narration: Meet Cold Charge. The high-intensity energy of a professional-grade beverage, wrapped in a boardroom-ready design.
scenes.camera_direction: Low angle, tracking the can as it slides into place. Sharp, high-speed focus.
scenes.image_prompt: 9:16, vertical shot, a premium silver and espresso coffee can with water droplets, held by a man in a navy tailored suit, modern corporate office background, sharp focus, high-end aesthetic.

scenes.visual_description: Alex walks confidently through a minimalist, glass-walled corridor. He takes a sip and looks focused. Fast-cut shots of his high-end tech gadgets and a clean workspace.
scenes.narration: No sugar-heavy stigma. No neon cans. Just clean energy for those who value efficiency and style.
scenes.camera_direction: Dynamic follow-shot, walking with the subject at eye level. Fast rhythmic cuts.
scenes.image_prompt: 9:16, professional male consultant in early 30s walking through a futuristic minimalist office, holding a sleek silver can, natural light, high-performance atmosphere, 8k resolution.

scenes.visual_description: A top-down view of a boardroom table. A Volt Brew can sits perfectly aligned with a sleek laptop and a leather notebook. Alex is seen in the background, leading a presentation with confidence.
scenes.narration: Designed for back-to-back meetings and high-stakes decision making. It’s the sharp mental edge you need, without the wait.
scenes.camera_direction: Bird's eye view overhead shot, slowly rotating. Transition to a medium shot of the presentation.
scenes.image_prompt: 9:16, top-down view of a marble boardroom table, silver Volt Brew can next to a modern laptop and leather journal, blurred professional meeting in background, premium corporate style.

scenes.visual_description: Extreme close-up of the can tab clicking open (loud, crisp sound). The liquid pours into a glass with clear ice cubes in slow motion. The Volt Brew logo fades in over the silver can.
scenes.narration: Upgrade your ritual. Experience the intensity of Cold Charge.
scenes.on_screen_text:
VOLT BREW: COLD CHARGE
Shop Now
scenes.camera_direction: Extreme close-up macro photography. Slow motion liquid movement.
scenes.image_prompt: 9:16, macro shot of dark espresso coffee pouring over crystal clear ice, silver sparks of light, premium liquid texture, espresso and silver tones, high contrast.

storyboards.music_mood: Upbeat electronic with building energy, subtle bass drops at transitions
storyboards.typography_style: Modern sans-serif (Inter/Poppins), bold headlines, light body text

scenes.visual_description: A dimly lit, ultra-modern studio. Maya sits at a glass desk with a silver laptop and digital tablet. She looks at her screen, rubbing her temples. The room is bathed in cool silver and deep espresso shadows.
scenes.narration: Your workspace is curated. Your aesthetic is intentional. But your energy?
scenes.camera_direction: Slow push-in on Maya’s face, transitioning to a top-down view of her desk.
scenes.image_prompt: Cinematic 9:16 shot of a stylish 25-year-old female creator in a minimalist silver and dark wood studio, soft moody lighting, tech gadgets on a glass desk, espresso tones, high-end photography.

scenes.visual_description: Extreme close-up of a Volt Brew Cold Charge can. A drop of condensation rolls down the brushed silver surface. The lighting is sharp, highlighting the metallic texture.
scenes.narration: Stop settling for neon cans that clash with your vibe.
scenes.camera_direction: Macro pan across the metallic logo of the Volt Brew can.
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme macro photography of a brushed silver aluminum beverage can with 'VOLT BREW' text, cold condensation droplets, sharp studio lighting, silver and dark coffee color palette, 9:16.

scenes.visual_description: Fast-paced montage: Maya cracks the can open (audible 'pssh'). She takes a sip. Cut to her digital tablet showing vibrant, fast-moving illustrations. The editing is rhythmic, synced to an underground electronic beat.
scenes.narration: Volt Brew Cold Charge. Energy drink intensity meets premium cold brew taste.
scenes.camera_direction: Quick rhythmic cuts, matching the beat of the music.
scenes.image_prompt: Fast motion blur of a hand opening a silver can, followed by a close-up of a digital drawing tablet with glowing art, silver and espresso color grading, 9:16.

scenes.visual_description: Slow motion shot of the dark, rich espresso liquid being poured over a single large clear ice cube in a designer glass. The silver can sits elegantly in the background.
scenes.narration: Clean energy. No sugar crash. Just pure creative flow.
scenes.image_prompt: Slow motion pour of dark specialty cold brew coffee into a glass with a clear ice cube, minimalist aesthetic, silver accents, high-end commercial look, 9:16.

scenes.visual_description: Maya is back in her flow, working confidently. She reaches for the silver can without looking, it fits perfectly in her workspace. The frame fades to a final product shot on a silver pedestal.
scenes.narration: Fuel the flow without breaking the visual. Volt Brew. Get the Brew.
scenes.on_screen_text:
VOLT BREW
COLD CHARGE
[Get the Brew]
scenes.camera_direction: Wide shot of Maya working, then a quick transition to a centered product packshot.
scenes.image_prompt: A ready-to-drink silver coffee can standing on a reflective silver surface, dark espresso background, premium lighting, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio.

storyboards.music_mood: Upbeat electronic with building energy, subtle bass drops at transitions
storyboards.typography_style: Modern sans-serif (Inter/Poppins), bold headlines, light body text
